title: User Management
description: Manage system users and their roles here.

dialogDescription.create: Create new user here. Click save when you're done.
dialogDescription.edit: Update the user here. Click save when you're done.

deleteDialog.title: Delete User
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete user {{userName}} ({{nickName}})?
deleteDialog.warning: This action will permanently remove the user from the system.

multiDeleteDialog.title: Delete {{count}} Users
multiDeleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} users?

inviteDialog.title: Invite User
inviteDialog.description: Invite new user to join your team by sending them an email invitation. Assign a role to define their access level.

placeholders.inviteDescription: Add a personal note to your invitation (optional)
